title: The 3-Day 'Ignis' Audit
description: A free 3-day 'alchemical' audit to diagnose your internal 'vessel' and find the 'Prima Materia' of your attention.

title: The 30-Day 'Vessel' Transformation
description: A 30-day guided course to rebuild your internal framework. The practical application of 'Ignis' (fire) and 'Aqua' (flow).

title: The 30-Day 'Architect's' Path
description: The advanced 30-day system. Master 'Terra' (structure) and 'Aer' (systems) to architect your entire personal reality.
